compiled_state.title: As a new project, I am onboarded with Semgrep installation and test quality tool configuration
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update the onboarding skill to include Semgrep installation instructions and language-specific test bloat detection tool configuration for the project's languages.
**Why**: The pre-commit test quality gate requires Semgrep (or language-specific alternatives) to function. Onboarding must ensure these tools are available with graceful degradation when installation fails.
**Scope**:
- IN: Onboarding skill updated to detect project languages and suggest appropriate test quality tools
- IN: Semgrep documented as a project dependency
- IN: Instructions to install Semgrep with graceful degradation (gate disables rather than blocks)
- IN: Configuration of language-specific test bloat detection tools for the project's languages
- OUT: The pre-commit gate implementation itself (separate story)
- OUT: The review overlay implementation (separate story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the onboarding skill includes instructions to install Semgrep and configure language-specific test bloat detection tools
  ← Satisfies: "the onboarding skill includes instructions to install Semgrep if not present"
- When this story is complete, Semgrep is documented as a project dependency
  ← Satisfies: "Semgrep is documented as a project dependency"
- When this story is complete, graceful degradation is configured when installation fails
  ← Satisfies: "graceful degradation when installation fails — gate disables rather than blocks"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD done-of-done

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Consideration: [Compatibility] Semgrep installation differs by project type (pip/pipx for Python, npm for Node). Onboarding must detect tools and write results to dso-config.conf using the same key names 3df5-939b reads.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Story complete: all tasks closed, completion-verifier PASS on all 4 done definitions.
comments.author: Test
